description: Hardcoded regex pattern for host validation that may not cover all valid host formats, especially internationalized domain names and new TLDs
suggested_fix: Make the regex configurable or use a more comprehensive validation library that handles IDNs and new TLDs

description: Headers property creates a new HttpHeaders object on each access instead of proper caching
suggested_fix: Ensure the cached_property properly caches the HttpHeaders instance and doesn't recreate it on each access

description: Accepted_types property parses Accept header on each access instead of caching the result
suggested_fix: Add proper caching to avoid parsing the Accept header multiple times

description: Missing validation for SERVER_NAME in META dictionary - could raise KeyError if not present
suggested_fix: Add proper validation and fallback handling for missing SERVER_NAME

description: get_host() method could be vulnerable to path traversal attacks if ALLOWED_HOSTS is not properly configured
suggested_fix: Add additional validation to strip path-like components from host header

description: get_signed_cookie uses signing which could be vulnerable to signature bypass if secret key is compromised
suggested_fix: Implement additional integrity checks and consider using more secure signing algorithms

description: parse_file_upload doesn't properly validate file upload sizes before processing
suggested_fix: Add size validation before parsing multipart data to prevent memory exhaustion attacks

description: HttpRequest class is a god object with over 500 lines of code handling too many responsibilities
suggested_fix: Split HttpRequest into smaller, focused classes following single responsibility principle

description: resolve() function doesn't handle exceptions from get_resolver() gracefully
suggested_fix: Add try-except blocks to handle potential resolver initialization errors

description: reverse() function has complex nested logic that could be optimized for better performance
suggested_fix: Refactor reverse() to simplify the namespace resolution logic and improve caching

description: View class is a god object handling dispatch, method resolution, async detection, and as_view creation
suggested_fix: Split View class into smaller components: Dispatcher, MethodResolver, AsyncDetector, etc.

description: as_view() method validation could be bypassed by adding methods with conflicting names
suggested_fix: Implement more robust validation that checks for method name conflicts more comprehensively

description: setup() method doesn't validate that subclasses properly use the initialized attributes
suggested_fix: Add validation in setup() to ensure required attributes are set by subclasses

description: http_method_not_allowed and options methods create unnecessary async function overhead
suggested_fix: Return the response directly for sync views instead of wrapping in async function

description: RedirectView duplicates HTTP method handlers (head, post, options, delete, put, patch) that all call get()
suggested_fix: Use a mixin or base class to handle common HTTP methods more efficiently

description: QuerySet class is a god file with over 3000 lines handling too many database operations
suggested_fix: Split QuerySet into smaller, focused classes: ReadQuerySet, WriteQuerySet, AggregateQuerySet, etc.

description: Hardcoded MAX_GET_RESULTS constant (21) may not be optimal for all use cases
suggested_fix: Make MAX_GET_RESULTS configurable via settings

description: __iter__ method calls _fetch_all() which loads all results into memory, inefficient for large querysets
suggested_fix: Optimize __iter__ to use chunked fetching for large querysets

description: get() method doesn't properly handle cases where multiple objects are returned
suggested_fix: Improve error messages and add better validation for get() queries

description: iterator() method has complex logic that could be simplified for better performance
suggested_fix: Refactor iterator() to reduce complexity and improve chunked fetching efficiency

description: bulk_create() method is too complex, handling multiple scenarios in one function
suggested_fix: Split bulk_create() into smaller, focused methods for different conflict resolution strategies

description: update() method doesn't properly handle cases where no rows are updated
suggested_fix: Add better error handling and return value validation for update operations

description: capfirst function has complex edge case handling that could be simplified
suggested_fix: Refactor capfirst to use more straightforward string manipulation

description: wrap function creates a new TextWrapper instance on each call instead of reusing
suggested_fix: Cache TextWrapper instances or make them reusable across calls

description: calculate_truncate_chars_length has complex character counting logic that could be simplified
suggested_fix: Refactor to use more straightforward Unicode character counting

description: TruncateHTMLParser class is overly complex and handles multiple HTML parsing scenarios
suggested_fix: Split into separate parsers for different HTML truncation needs

description: slugify function has complex Unicode handling that could be more modular
suggested_fix: Break slugify into smaller functions for normalization, filtering, and formatting
